description_long: This is a rectangular log cabin constructed from horizontally stacked, rounded wooden logs, giving it a classic rustic appearance. The roof is composed of closely aligned cylindrical logs, forming a flat, sturdy surface with a slight overhang on all sides. The front facade features a single wooden door and a small square window, both framed in darker wood, while the other sides each have a single small window. The windows are simple, square, and unadorned, contributing to the utilitarian aesthetic. The cabin sits low to the ground, with no visible foundation or porch, and the overall structure is compact and robust. The wood grain and natural color variations are visible throughout, emphasizing the handcrafted, traditional log cabin style.
description: A compact, rectangular log cabin made of stacked wooden logs with a flat log roof, a single door, and small square windows on each side. The design is rustic and utilitarian, with visible wood grain and no porch.
description_view_0: The end view shows the flat log roof and a single small square window centered on the wall, with the rounded log ends clearly visible.
description_view_1: The main facade displays a wooden door offset to the right and a small square window to the left, both framed in darker wood, with the log roof overhanging slightly.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0, featuring a single small square window centered on the wall and the ends of the roof logs.
description_view_3: This side view shows only a single small square window near the center, with no door or additional features visible.
attribute_roof_type: flat log roof with slight overhang, constructed from parallel cylindrical logs
attribute_window_arrangement: Four small square windows, one centered on each side of the cabin, arranged symmetrically and spaced apart, with no grouping or clustering
attribute_door_placement: A single wooden door located on the front facade, offset to the right of center, adjacent to a window
